caption: The video features a woman sitting in what appears to be a podcast or radio studio, as indicated by the microphone and headphones she is wearing. She has her hair styled in an updo and is dressed in a black top. The background includes a screen displaying the name "Johnson" and a sign that reads "Employee Only." The setting suggests a professional environment, likely for recording audio content. The woman seems engaged, possibly speaking or listening intently during the recording session. The logos and text on the screen indicate that this is part of the "Boss Talk 101 Podcast," which focuses on unique business insights or discussions.
